section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a preference for french fries.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This dietary preference is not clearly relevant to the presenting problem and is more in the realm of general/social history; its inclusion in HPI is organizationally loose but not misleading.
This is a patient-reported symptom denial and belongs in the history; placing it under Findings could mislead a reader into thinking it was an exam or test-based finding rather than history.
